debug_info.goal:
case corec
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α
f : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α → F (α ::: @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α) :=
  fun self =>
    map
      (TypeVec.id :::
        @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk.corec n F inst✝ α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α self) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α self))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest n F α self)
a b : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α
h_bisim :
  let un := @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b;
  ∃ R, @MvQPF.Coalg.IsBisim n F inst✝ α un R ∧ R (Sum.inl (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) (Sum.inr (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))
σ✝ : Type u
un : σ✝ → F (α ::: σ✝)
d' : σ✝
h_un : @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b = @MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α σ✝ un d'
⊢ map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α a) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) =
    map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α b) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))

    have h_eq : ∀ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ), R (.inl s) (.inr t) →

      Quot.sound h_bisim
    simp only [← StateCofixFinal.toCofix.eq_def] at heq

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR_init⟩
    have key : ∀ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ), R (.inl s) (.inr t) → 
        Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' s) = 
        Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' t) := by
      intro s t hst
      apply Quot.sound
      use fun | .inl s', .inr t' => R (.inl s') (.inr t') | _, _ => False
      refine ⟨?_, hst⟩
      intro x y hxy
      match x, y with
      | .inl s', .inr t' =>
        specialize hR_bisim _ _ hxy
        simp only [Coalg.union, MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR_bisim
        rcases hR_bisim with ⟨u, f₁, f₂, h1, h2, hrel⟩

        use u, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) ⊚ f₁, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) ⊚ f₂
        refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc]
          convert h1 using 2
          ext i x <;> rfl
        · simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.comp_assoc]
          convert h2 using 2
          ext i x <;> rfl
        · intro i j
          cases i with
          | fz => exact hrel _ j
          | fs i => exact hrel _ j
      | .inl _, .inl _ => exact (hxy).elim
      | .inr _, .inr _ => exact (hxy).elim
      | .inr _, .inl _ => exact (hxy).elim
    specialize hR_bisim _ _ hR_init
    simp only [Coalg.union] at hR_bisim
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR_bisim
    rcases hR_bisim with ⟨u, f₁, f₂, h1, h2, hrel⟩
    congr 1
    ext i x
    cases i with
    | fz => 
      have := hrel (Fin2.fs Fin2.fz) x
      simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz] at this ⊢
      rfl
    | fs i =>
      simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, Fin2.cases_fs]
      congr 1
      have := hrel Fin2.fz x
      simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz, RelLast] at this
      exact key _ _ this

      use fun

        · rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use (repr (b.dest' s)).fst

          use ((TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) ⊚ (repr (b.dest' s)).snd)

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩ := h_bisim
    have ha : Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' a.s) = Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim a := Quot.sound (by
      simp only [Coalg.Bisim, Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim]
      use fun | .inl s, .inr t => s = t | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · simp only [Sum.forall, IsEmpty.forall_iff, implies_true, true_and, and_true]
        intro s t h
        subst h
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        let r := repr (a.dest' t)
        use r.fst, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) ⊚ r.snd, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) ⊚ r.snd
        simp only [r, abs_map, abs_repr, true_and]
        intro i j; cases i <;> rfl
      · rfl)
    have hb : Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' b.s) = Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim b := Quot.sound (by
      simp only [Coalg.Bisim, Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim]
      use fun | .inl s, .inr t => s = t | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · simp only [Sum.forall, IsEmpty.forall_iff, implies_true, true_and, and_true]
        intro s t h
        subst h
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
        let r := repr (b.dest' t)
        use r.fst, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) ⊚ r.snd, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) ⊚ r.snd
        simp only [r, abs_map, abs_repr, true_and]
        intro i j; cases i <;> rfl
      · rfl)
    congr 1
    funext i
    cases i with
    | fz => rfl
    | fs j => 
      funext x
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      simp only [Coalg.Bisim, Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim]
      use fun | .inl s, .inr t => ∃ R, Coalg.IsBisim (self := a.union b) R ∧ R (.inl s) (.inr t) | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · simp only [Sum.forall, IsEmpty.forall_iff, implies_true, true_and, and_true]
        intro s t ⟨R', hR'_bisim, hR'⟩
        specialize hR'_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hR'
        simp only [Coalg.union] at hR'_bisim
        rw [MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map] at hR'_bisim
        rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR'_bisim ⊢
        obtain ⟨a', f₀, f₁, hf₀, hf₁, hrel⟩ := hR'_bisim
        use a', (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) ⊚ f₀, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) ⊚ f₁
        refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp only [← TypeVec.comp_assoc, ← abs_map, hf₀]
        · simp only [← TypeVec.comp_assoc, ← abs_map, hf₁]
        · intro i j
          cases i with
          | fz => exact hrel Fin2.fz j
          | fs k => 
            simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz]
            exact ⟨R', hR'_bisim, hrel (Fin2.fs k) j⟩
      · exact ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR_init⟩
    have hR := hR_bisim (.inl a.s) (.inr b.s) hR_init
    simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at hR_bisim hR
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR
    rcases hR with ⟨a', f₁, f₂, h1, h2, hrel⟩
    rw [← h1, ← h2]
    simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
    congr 1
    funext i
    fin_cases i
    · rfl
    · funext x
      have := hrel (Fin2.fs Fin2.fz) x
      simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, RelLast, Fin2.cases_fs, Fin2.cases_fz] at this
      cases f₁ (Fin2.fs Fin2.fz) x <;> cases f₂ (Fin2.fs Fin2.fz) x <;> simp_all only
      · apply congrArg
        apply Quot.sound
        exact ⟨R, hR_bisim, this⟩
      · apply congrArg
        apply Quot.sound
        exact ⟨R, hR_bisim, this⟩

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩
    simp only [Coalg.union] at h_un
    cases h_un
    specialize hR_bisim _ _ hR
    simp only [Coalg.union] at hR_bisim
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR_bisim
    rcases hR_bisim with ⟨u, f₁, f₂, ha, hb, hf⟩
    rw [← ha, ← hb, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]

    ext i x

      simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Function.comp_apply]
      apply congrArg ofLarge
      apply Quot.sound
      exact ⟨fun | .inl s, .inr t => R (.inl s) (.inr t) | _, _ => False, by simp [Coalg.IsBisim, Coalg.union, hR_bisim], hf Fin2.fz x⟩
    | fs j => simp [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun]

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩ := h_bisim
    have key : ∀ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ), R (.inl s) (.inr t) → 
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' s)) = 
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' t)) := by
      intro s t hst
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      exact ⟨fun x y => R (.inl x) (.inr y), fun s' t' h' => hR_bisim _ _ h', hst⟩
    have hRst := hR_bisim _ _ hR
    rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at hRst
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_map, MvQPF.liftR_map] at hRst
    cases MvQPF.liftR_iff.mp hRst with
    | intro w =>
      obtain ⟨P, f₁, f₂, hf₁, hf₂, hrel⟩ := w
      rw [← hf₁, ← hf₂, ← MvFunctor.map_map, ← MvFunctor.map_map]
      congr 1
      ext i x
      cases i <;> simp only [TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id]
      exact key _ _ (hrel (Fin2.fs Fin2.fz) x)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR_init⟩
    congr 1
    ext i x
    cases i with
    | fz =>
      simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz]
      congr 1
      apply congrArg ofLarge
      apply Quot.sound
      simp only [Coalg.Bisim, Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim]
      use fun | .inl s, .inr t => R (.inl s) (.inr t) | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · simp only [Sum.forall, IsEmpty.forall_iff, implies_true, true_and, and_true]
        intro s t hRst
        have := hR_bisim (.inl s) (.inr t) hRst
        simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at this
        convert this using 2 <;> ext j y <;> cases j <;> rfl
      · exact hR_init
    | fs i => simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fs]

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩
    have ha : Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' a.s) = Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim a := rfl
    have hb : Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' b.s) = Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim b := rfl
    congr 1
    ext i
    cases i with
    | fz => rfl
    | fs j =>
      ext s
      apply congrArg ofLarge
      apply Quot.sound
      exact ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩ := h_bisim
    have : a.toCofix = b.toCofix := by
      apply MvQPF.Cofix.bisim (fun x y => ∃ s t, R (.inl s) (.inr t) ∧ x = Coalg.toCofix {a with s := s} ∧ y = Coalg.toCofix {b with s := t})
      · intro x y ⟨s, t, hst, rfl, rfl⟩; simp only [Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec]; sorry
      · exact ⟨a.s, b.s, hR, rfl, rfl⟩
    simp only [← this, Coalg.toCofix, Cofix.dest_corec, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
    sorry

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩ := h_bisim
    have key : ∀ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ), R (.inl s) (.inr t) → 
        Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' s) = Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' t) := by
      intro s t hst
      apply Quot.sound
      use fun x y => R (.inl x) (.inr y)
      constructor
      · intro s' t' hst'
        exact hR_bisim (.inl s') (.inr t') hst'
      · exact hst
    simp only [← Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, ← Coalg.union_dest_eq_right] at hR_bisim
    have := hR_bisim (.inl a.s) (.inr b.s) hR
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at this
    obtain ⟨u, f₁, f₂, h1, h2, hrel⟩ := this
    rw [← h1, ← h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1
    ext i x
    cases i with
    | fz => 
      simp only [TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.appendFun, Function.comp_apply]
      exact congrArg ofLarge (key _ _ (hrel Fin2.fz x))
    | fs i => rfl

congr 1
    · ext i x
      cases i <;> rfl
    · rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩
      have := hR_bisim (.inl a.s) (.inr b.s) hR
      simp only [Coalg.union] at this
      rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at this
      rcases this with ⟨P, f1, f2, h1, h2, h3⟩
      rw [← h1, ← h2]
      congr 1
      ext i x
      cases i with
      | fz => 
        simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.id]
        have := h3 Fin2.fz x
        simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp] at this
        apply congrArg
        apply Quot.sound
        exact ⟨R, hR_bisim, this⟩
      | fs i => 
        simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, Function.comp_apply, TypeVec.id]
        have := h3 (Fin2.fs i) x
        simp only [TypeVec.RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, TypeVec.id] at this
        exact this

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, h_is_bisim, h_R⟩
    have h_eq : ∀ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ), R (.inl s) (.inr t) →
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' s)) =
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' t)) := by
      intro s t hRst
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      exact ⟨R, h_is_bisim, hRst⟩
    specialize h_is_bisim _ _ h_R
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_is_bisim
    rcases h_is_bisim with ⟨u, f₁, f₂, h1, h2, h_rel⟩
    simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest'] at h1 h2
    rw [← h1, ← h2]
    simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
    congr 1
    funext i x
    cases i with
    | fz =>
      specialize h_rel Fin2.fz x
      simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.cases_fz] at h_rel
      exact h_eq _ _ h_rel
    | fs j => rfl

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR_init⟩ := h_bisim
    have key : ∀ (s : a.σ) (t : b.σ), R (.inl s) (.inr t) → 
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec a.dest' s)) = 
        ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' t)) := by
      intro s t hst
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      exact ⟨R, hR_bisim, hst⟩
    have h_liftR := hR_bisim _ _ hR_init
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_liftR
    obtain ⟨u, f_l, f_r, h_l, h_r, h_rel⟩ := h_liftR
    simp only [Coalg.union] at h_l h_r
    rw [← h_l, ← h_r, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1
    funext i
    cases i with
    | fz => 
      funext x
      have := h_rel Fin2.fz x
      simp only [RelLast, TypeVec.appendFun, Fin2.elim0] at this
      cases f_l Fin2.fz x <;> cases f_r Fin2.fz x <;> simp_all
      exact key _ _ this
    | fs j =>
      funext x
      have := h_rel (.fs j) x
      simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.id] at this ⊢
      exact this

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩
    conv_lhs => rw [show a.dest' a.s = (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) <$$> a.dest' a.s from (by simp)]
    sorry

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩ := h_bisim
    have ha := hR_bisim (.inl a.s) (.inr b.s) hR
    simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.dest'] at ha
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at ha
    obtain ⟨u, f₁, f₂, h1, h2, hf⟩ := ha
    rw [← h1, ← h2, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1
    ext i x
    cases i with
    | fz => simp [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp]
    | fs i =>
      simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, TypeVec.comp, Fin2.cases_fs, Function.comp_apply]
      have := hf (.fs i) x
      simp only [RelLast, Fin2.cases_fs] at this
      rfl
  Quot.lift f h self.toLarge

simp only [← Coalg.toCofix, ← StateCofixFinal.toCofix, ← StateCofixFinal.ofCofix]
    congr 1
    simp only [Cofix.dest, h_eq]

congr 1
    funext i x
    fin_cases i
    · rfl
    · exact congrArg ofLarge (Quot.sound ⟨fun | .inl s, .inr t => R (.inl s) (.inr t) | _, _ => False, 
        fun | .inl s, .inr t, h => hR_bisim _ _ h | .inl _, .inl _, h => h.elim | .inr _, .inr _, h => h.elim | .inr _, .inl _, h => h.elim, hR⟩)

rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, h_is_bisim, h_R⟩
    simp only [Coalg.IsBisim] at h_is_bisim
    specialize h_is_bisim (.inl a.s) (.inr b.s) h_R
    simp only [Coalg.union] at h_is_bisim
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at h_is_bisim
    rcases h_is_bisim with ⟨a', f_l, f_r, h_l, h_r, h_rel⟩
    rw [← h_l, ← h_r, MvFunctor.map_map, MvFunctor.map_map]
    congr 1
    funext i
    cases i with
    | fz =>
      funext x
      apply congrArg
      apply Quot.sound
      simp only [Coalg.Bisim, Coalg.union]
      use fun | .inl s, .inr t => R (.inl (.inl s)) (.inr (.inr t)) | _, _ => False
      constructor
      · simp only [Coalg.IsBisim, Sum.forall, IsEmpty.forall_iff, implies_true, true_and, and_true]
        rintro _ t h_Rt
        simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
        have := h_is_bisim (.inl _) (.inr t) h_Rt
        simp only [Coalg.union, MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at this
        convert this using 2 <;> rfl
      · exact h_rel Fin2.fz x
    | fs i =>
      rfl

obtain ⟨R, hR_bisim, hR⟩ := h_bisim
    have hR' := hR_bisim _ _ hR
    simp only [Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim] at hR_bisim hR'
    simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id] at hR'
    rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff] at hR'
    obtain ⟨u, ha, hb, hrel⟩ := hR'
    rw [← ha, ← hb]
    simp only [MvFunctor.map_map, ← TypeVec.appendFun_comp_id]
    congr 1
    funext i
    fin_cases i
    · rfl
    · simp only [TypeVec.appendFun, Fin.lastCases_last, Function.comp]
      funext x
      congr 1
      apply Quot.sound
      simp only [Coalg.Bisim, Coalg.union, Coalg.IsBisim]
      exact ⟨fun s t => R (Sum.inl s) (Sum.inr t), fun s t hst => hR_bisim _ _ hst, hrel (Fin.last _) x⟩
